overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game. The player character explores a dimly lit space station facility, discovers a dead body in a cafeteria and examines it to collect an ID badge, then continues through corridors to a maintenance workshop. The environment features teal and red emergency lighting with industrial metal architecture.

events.description: approaching and entering the cafeteria door from the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with horizontal teal light strips, approaching a door labeled CANTEEN

metal door with glass panel leading to the cafeteria area
wall-mounted access panel with red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit sci-fi corridor illuminated by teal fluorescent strips. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a metal door with a glass panel marked CANTEEN, transitioning from the corridor into the cafeteria space.

scene_state.functional_zone: cafeteria with folding tables and illuminated serving counter

events.description: character approaches the body lying face-down on a table

entered.detail: white folding tables arranged in rows throughout the room
illuminated serving counter with glowing TERRA logo and white base
large white projection screen on the wall displaying text

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious cafeteria with rows of white folding tables and chairs. An illuminated counter with the TERRA logo glows in the background. The character approaches a body lying face-down on a central table, with a large projection screen visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: close examination of body on table

events.description: character examines the dead body and lifts the head to check for identification
character removes an ID badge from the body's chest pocket

agents.ego_description: examining the dead body closely, lifting the head to reveal the face, and removing an ID badge from the uniform

notable_agents.action: dead man with blood on face being examined and searched for items

entered.detail: identification card removed from the body's chest pocket

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses closely on the dead body as the character interacts with it. The character lifts the man's head to examine his face, then removes an ID badge from his chest pocket. The surrounding tables and chairs remain visible in the background while the character completes the examination.

scene_state.functional_zone: connecting corridors between cafeteria and workshop

events.description: exiting the cafeteria into a kitchen area and then into corridors
entering a long corridor with bright horizontal light strips

agents.ego_description: leaving the cafeteria and navigating through kitchen and corridor areas with changing lighting conditions

entered.detail: food preparation area with sinks, counters, and cabinets
lengthy corridor with bright horizontal light strips on both walls
section of corridor illuminated with red emergency lights

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and exits the cafeteria, passing through a kitchen area with stainless steel counters. The journey continues through various corridors, including a long passage with bright horizontal light strips and sections with red emergency lighting, before approaching a secure door.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance workshop with tool bench and storage

events.description: character interacts with items on the workbench and checks wrist-mounted device

agents.ego_description: entering the workshop, examining tools on the workbench, and using a wrist-mounted holographic device

entered.detail: cluttered workbench with tools, wires, and supply cans
wall-mounted yellow plastic storage bins with various parts
holographic wrist display showing TERRA interface and inventory menu

segments.scene_description: The character enters a maintenance workshop filled with tools and equipment. The camera focuses on the workbench as the character interacts with various items, then brings up a holographic display on their wrist device showing the TERRA corporation interface and inventory system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, dimly lit corridor into a grim cafeteria and finally into a cluttered industrial workshop. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage illuminated by teal fluorescent strips before transitioning through a glass-paneled door into a spacious cafeteria filled with white folding tables. As the character approaches a body lying face-down on a central table, the camera tightens its focus to capture the removal of an ID badge from the victim's chest. The scene then shifts as the character exits through a stainless steel kitchen and navigates a series of corridors where the lighting fluctuates between bright horizontal strips and red emergency glows. Finally, the camera enters a maintenance workshop filled with tools, settling on a workbench as a holographic TERRA corporation interface flickers into view from the character's wrist device.
